title: Key Management, Rotation, HSMs, KMS, and Compromise · Runtime Contract: Crypto Go Key Compromise Recovery
summary: A platform stores a master key in source control, rotates aliases without proving old reads, grants every service decrypt authority, and has no compromise recovery drill. Predict the asset, adversary, security property, trust boundary, and falsifying evidence before opening the governing standard. Planned artifact: Add and verify the key compromise recovery increment in key lifecycle, custody, and rotation runbook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, ca…
objectives: Inventory affected uses, contain authority, rotate or revoke, rewrap or re-encrypt, restore service, notify stakeholders, and prove old-key handling.
Design an interface for non-exportable HSM or KMS operations and state what attestation, latency, quota, availability, and audit evidence remains external.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Predict Crypto Go Key Compromise Recovery · Theory Crypto Go Key Compromise Rec…
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory cryptographic engineering team handles case 4700 during a post-quantum compatibility canary. Build deterministic Go evidence to enforce immutable key identity, state, cryptoperiod, least privilege, and tested recovery; keep browser execution deterministic and move production entropy, native timing, non-allowlisted crypto, network, HSM, and compliance claims to authorized transfer gates; then rotate the active key while old data remains readable and new writes cannot downgrade. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Crypto Go Key Compromise Recovery contract for the supplied data.
